//: Sample configuration for the FactoryOS plugin framework. Bind the 'Plugins' section into appsettings. Discovery scans RootPath's immediate subfolders for module.json manifests; the catalog projects plugin metadata and health; Health governs heartbeat/failure detection. Per-plugin settings live under 'Plugins:Configuration:<key>', where the 'Enabled' key toggles the plugin (default true). No secrets belong here.
